name: Spaghetti Alla Carbonara
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Bacon, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti in a large amount of boiling salted water until al dente. Drain and return to the saucepan.
2. In a separate pan, sauté the bacon and onion over medium heat until the bacon is slightly crisp and the onion is tender.
3. Combine the beaten eggs, grated Parmesan cheese, chopped parsley, and pepper in a bowl.
4. Add the hot bacon mixture and egg mixture to the hot spaghetti. The eggs will cook slightly upon contact with the hot pasta.
5. Blend thoroughly to ensure an even coating of sauce on the pasta.
6. Serve immediately. Serves 6-8.
